title: thelypteris nitida
intro: Thelypteris nitida, also known as the glossy maiden fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae. It is traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Thelypteris nitida are said to include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of the plant are typically dried and used in teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
